youtube_metadata.description: Mind-blowing athletic records, historic sports milestones, and bizarre game rule facts. #shorts #sports

fallback_facts.yt_search_query: wilt chamberlain basketball jersey 100 points game
fallback_facts.text_block: In nineteen sixty-two, NBA legend Wilt Chamberlain scored an incredible <yellow>one hundred points</yellow> in a single game. No player in basketball history has ever <red>broken this record since.</red>
fallback_facts.title: Chamberlain's 100 Point Game

fallback_facts.yt_search_query: usain bolt 100m sprint running track world record
fallback_facts.text_block: Usain Bolt ran the 100-meter dash in a world record <yellow>nine point five eight seconds</yellow> in 2009. His peak speed reached over <red>twenty-seven miles per hour.</red>
fallback_facts.title: Bolt's World Record
